category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes fdroidcl as the F-Droid desktop client.
source_facts.description says fdroidcl is an F-Droid desktop client.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the upstream documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Hoverth/fdroidcl; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an F-Droid desktop client.
source_facts.executables lists `fdroidcl` and package-manager mappings identify Android/F-Droid distribution context.
